body:
If your garage door is stuck or a broken spring has trapped your car inside, several well-reviewed garage door companies serve the East Bay with 24/7 emergency support. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=That's%20why%20Right%20Way%20Garage,when%20we're%20needed%20most.)

The top options across the East Bay that offer around-the-clock emergency dispatch include:

### 1\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

A highly recognizable name in the region, Precision has live operators answering calls 24/7. Their service trucks are fully stocked as "mobile warehouses," meaning they can usually complete 99% of emergency repairs (like broken springs, cables, or doors off-track) in a single visit. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/#:~:text=Same%20Day%20Service,installed%20in%202024%20in%20the)

  * **Areas Served:** Oakland, Berkeley, Fremont, Walnut Creek, Pleasanton, Hayward, Lafayette, and Antioch. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/)

  * **Emergency Support:** Live person 24/7, with late evening and weekend availability. [Precision Garage Door East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/#:~:text=Same%20Day%20Service,installed%20in%202024%20in%20the)

### 2\. R&S Overhead Garage Door (San Leandro / Oakland)

An industry veteran with over 60 years of experience in the Bay Area. R&S provides 24/7 emergency service specifically tailored to situations that compromise your home's or business's security, safety, or access. They handle both residential garage doors and commercial overhead doors. [R&S Overhead: Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA](https://rsdoors.com/#:~:text=With%2060%2B%20years%20of%20door,options%20from%20start%20to%20finish.&text=Complete%20Door%20and%20Operator%20Service,or%20safety%20is%20at%20risk.&text=Service%2C%20Installation%20%26%20Repair-,24%2F7%20EMERGENCY%20SERVICE%20FREE%20ESTIMATE%20CALL%20\(510\)%20483,Certified%20%26%20Trained%20Professionals)

  * **Areas Served:** San Leandro, Oakland, and South Alameda County. [R&S Overhead: Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA](https://rsdoors.com/#:~:text=Certified%20%26%20Trained%20Professionals-,24%2F7%20EMERGENCY%20SERVICE%20FREE%20ESTIMATE%20CALL%20\(510\)%20483,and%20Surrounding%20Areas)

  * **Emergency Support:** 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including weekends and holidays. [R&S Overhead: Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA](https://rsdoors.com/#:~:text=Garage%20door%20problems%20don't,We'll%20come%20to%20you.)

### 3\. Right Way Garage Doors

Right Way offers 24/7 emergency repair across the entire East Bay. They focus heavily on immediate safety and security responses, sending out technicians to handle urgent structural collapses, motor failures, or snapped cables. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=That's%20why%20Right%20Way%20Garage,when%20we're%20needed%20most.)

  * **Areas Served:** Widespread East Bay coverage. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=ight%20Way%20Garage%20Doors%20is,Experienced%20technicians.)

  * **Emergency Support:** 24/7 rapid dispatch with upfront, transparent pricing. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/)

### 4\. Nor-Cal Overhead

A family-owned and operated business servicing the broader Bay Area, Nor-Cal offers emergency, night, and weekend appointments for both residential and commercial doors. They guarantee same-day service for urgent calls. [24 Hour Emergency Service | Nor-Cal Overhead | Bay Area, CA](https://www.norcaloverheaddoor.com/services/24-hour-emergency-service/#:~:text=Did%20your%20garage%20break%20after,24%2F7%20emergency%20repair%20services.)[Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/#:~:text=Our%20technicians%20are%20available%20around,Expert%20diagnosis%20and%20repairs.)

  * **Areas Served:** Fremont, Hayward, Oakland, Pleasanton, Danville, Walnut Creek, Brentwood, and Livermore.

  * **Emergency Support:** 24/7 emergency repair hotline. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/)

### 5\. All Elite Garage Door Repair

If you are located closer to the inner East Bay, All Elite is known for a rapid response timeline, typically dispatching a technician to your location within 1 to 2 hours for late-night emergencies. [24/7 Garage Door Repair Oakland CA | All Elite Garage Door Repair](https://allelitegaragedoorrepair.com/#:~:text=Frequently%20Asked%20Questions,What%20areas%20do%20you%20serve%3F)

  * **Areas Served:** Oakland, Berkeley, Emeryville, Alameda, San Leandro, Hayward, and Castro Valley. [24/7 Garage Door Repair Oakland CA | All Elite Garage Door Repair](https://allelitegaragedoorrepair.com/)

  * **Emergency Support:** 24/7 emergency response.

> ⚠️ **Quick Safety Tip:** If your garage door has a broken torsion spring (usually located on the wall right above the door), **do not** attempt to open the door manually or fix it yourself. These springs operate under extreme tension and can cause severe injury. Wait for the technician to secure the door safely. [Garage Door Installation Bay Area | Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/emergency-garage-door-repair-services/)
